response.justification: Candidate lacks the core requirements for this role: no native-level Japanese proficiency indicated, no C programming experience for UNIX (only brief C/C++ work at National Instruments a decade ago), and no demonstrated Linux kernel modification, embedded firmware, or networking security (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3) experience. Background is in web, full-stack, and GIS development rather than embedded LAN-switch security.
strengths: Long and varied software development career across multiple domains
Strong testing and software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD)
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
concerns: No native-level Japanese language proficiency listed
No Linux kernel source-code modification or embedded firmware experience
No networking security background (MACsec, 802.1X, L2/L3, switch chip SDKs)

key_factors.factor: No network security or LAN-switch domain knowledge
